basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitk.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 4 years Bachelor's Degree in Materials/Chemical Engineering/Master's Degree Chemistry and Physics.
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: 4 years Bachelor's Degree in Materials/Chemical Engineering Master's Degree Chemistry and Physics Prior experience in computational research in one of the areas: Machine learning methods, Molecular simulations, Spectral calculations.

salary_details.details: Rs. 30000/-Per Month + HRA if staying outside the campus.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates may be called for an interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Kanpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Kanpur is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a 4-year Bachelor's Degree in Materials or Chemical Engineering, or a Master's Degree in Chemistry and Physics. Prior experience in specific computational research areas is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month, plus HRA if they are staying outside the campus premises.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the provided link. You can find the direct application link in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee has been mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview for the shortlisted individuals.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment, meaning the position is tied to a specific research project at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q8. Which department at IIT Kanpur is hiring for this role?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the Department of Chemistry at IIT Kanpur, for a project focused on Theoretical studies of terahertz (THz) spectroscopy.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.Rect./R&D/2026/143.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India.
